prompt: An adult female World Cup soccer babe excitedly raising her hands during a victory celebration, wearing form-fitting but not overly revealing fashionable support clothing in national team representative colors. The background features falling confetti, a score screen, stadium lights, and a cheering crowd. The overall image looks like a post-match victory poster, with heated emotions, high-definition realistic photography.
